author: doll-agent
content: Phase-1 long tail #694 delivered: pad (constant/edge/reflect/symmetric/wrap modes), tile, repeat, delete, insert, append, resize, trim_zeros. All bound at top-level matching numpy.* convention. pad accepts int/tuple/sequence pad_width. linear_ramp/maximum/minimum/mean/median pad modes deferred. Per-element repeat counts deferred (only scalar 'repeats' bound). 525+ pytest still green.
